title: Commons Integration
description: Commons Integration connects Parthenon to shared research infrastructure, enabling collaborative access to federated datasets, shared cohort definitions, and community-contributed analytical assets. This feature supports open-science workflows and facilitates participation in distributed research networks.
tips: Link your Parthenon environment to a Commons repository to access pre-validated cohort definitions contributed by the broader research community.
Verify data use agreements and access permissions before importing or exporting assets through the Commons integration.
Use Commons to share finalized study packages with network partners to ensure consistent analysis execution.
Review imported assets carefully to confirm they align with your local vocabulary version and CDM configuration.
